message:
feat(obligation): register Lyapunov governor module + allow large_stack_frames in tests

obligation/lyapunov.rs (new):
- Potential-function-based scheduling governor that drives cancellation
  drain toward quiescence using Lyapunov stability theory

obligation/mod.rs:
- Register lyapunov sub-module and add module documentation entry

lib.rs:
- Allow clippy::large_stack_frames in test builds (test harness
  builds a large test table in one frame)

Also sync beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
